title: limnophila villifera subsp. villifera
intro: Limnophila villifera subsp. villifera, also known as swamp basil or Thai basil, is a subspecies of aquatic plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and antifungal properties that can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Limnophila villifera subsp. villifera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
